'''zhazodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zaisang|zaisang]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-z-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zaisang|zaisang]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhazodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæzedheth|zhæzedheth]] || [[word:zhæzedhej|zhæzedhej]] || [[word:zhæzedhesh|zhæzedhesh]] || [[word:zhæzedhe|zhæzedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhazozodhoth|zhazozodhoth]] || [[word:zhazozodhoj|zhazozodhoj]] || [[word:zhazozodhosh|zhazozodhosh]] || [[word:zhazozodho|zhazozodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhazodhoth|zhazodhoth]] || [[word:zhazodhoj|zhazodhoj]] || [[word:zhazodhosh|zhazodhosh]] || [[word:zhazodho|zhazodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhazofdhoth|zhazofdhoth]] || [[word:zhazofdhoj|zhazofdhoj]] || [[word:zhazofdhosh|zhazofdhosh]] || [[word:zhazofdhof|zhazofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhazodhotho|zhazodhotho]] || [[word:zhazodhojo|zhazodhojo]] || [[word:zhazodhosho|zhazodhosho]] || [[word:zhazodhoko|zhazodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhazodhoth|zhazodhoth]] || [[word:zhazodhoj|zhazodhoj]] || [[word:zhazodhosh|zhazodhosh]] || [[word:zhazodho|zhazodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhazodhothol|zhazodhothol]] || [[word:zhazodhojol|zhazodhojol]] || [[word:zhazodhoshol|zhazodhoshol]] || [[word:zhazodhokol|zhazodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhazodhothotho|zhazodhothotho]] || [[word:zhazodhojojo|zhazodhojojo]] || [[word:zhazodhoshosho|zhazodhoshosho]] || [[word:zhazodhoko|zhazodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhazodhothon|zhazodhothon]] || [[word:zhazodhojon|zhazodhojon]] || [[word:zhazodhoshon|zhazodhoshon]] || [[word:zhazodhokon|zhazodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhazodhothoro|zhazodhothoro]] || [[word:zhazodhojoro|zhazodhojoro]] || [[word:zhazodhoshoro|zhazodhoshoro]] || [[word:zhazodhokoro|zhazodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
